description: Routing variant: max-throughput (as_of 2026-07-12). Cheapest legs that hold the floors: strong_reasoning stays strong-tier (Sonnet 5), the reviewer stays in a different family (GPT-5.6 Terra), effort stays high. Anthropic + OpenAI only, two hosts. Paste over the model_routing section of quality-loop.config.json, then run setup-models and check-config.

strong_reasoning.note: Floor: planning and risk classes never drop below a strong-tier model.
Cheaper reviewer tier, still a different family than the implementer.

main_session.note: Implementer runs in the Claude Code main session on Sonnet 5.
